name: Iron Rich Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flours, wheatgerm, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Stir in the oats and brown sugar until thoroughly mixed.
3. Mix in the raisins.
4. In another bowl, mix together the oil, blackstrap molasses, and water.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Grease a 23 x 13 x 7 cm loaf pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes.
